subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the Ancient Beauty and leaves of the Tree of Bounty! Now, when the eye of creation hath been illumined by beholding the Most Great Signs [3.5s]... ...Exert yourselves, that haply ye may be enabled to acquire such virtues as shall honour and distinguish you amongst all women. Of a surety, there is no greater pride and glory
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء جمال قدم و ورقات سدره موهبت اکنون که چشم امکان بمشاهده ایات کبری روشن
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @education of children; moral education
